# IP-005: Method call chain — vulnerable
lang: go
file: IP-005-vulnerable.go
variant: taint
---
package sample

import (
    "net/http"
    "os"
)

type Handler struct{}

func (h *Handler) Serve() {
    path := r.URL.Query().Get("path")
    h.openFile(path)
}

func (h *Handler) openFile(p string) {
    os.Open(p)
}
